name: How to Run a Forensic Tax Audit with ATO Tax Optimizer
description: Step-by-step guide to connecting Xero and running an AI-powered Australian tax analysis to recover missed deductions and R&D tax incentives.

step.name: Create your free account
step.text: Sign up at ato-ai.app — free trial includes one full analysis run.

step.name: Connect Xero via OAuth 2.0
step.text: Click 'Connect Xero' and authorise read-only access. Takes under 60 seconds. No Xero data is modified.

step.name: Select your financial year
step.text: Choose 2023-24 or 2024-25. ATO Tax Optimizer pulls all relevant transactions for the period.

step.name: Choose analysis modules
step.text: Select from R&D Tax Incentive, Division 7A compliance, FBT optimisation, and unclaimed deductions modules.

step.name: Review AI findings
step.text: The platform generates findings in 5-10 minutes. Each finding includes the relevant tax legislation (ITAA 1997, ITAA 1936, FBTAA 1986) and estimated recovery amount.

step.name: Export your report
step.text: Download PDF or Excel report pre-formatted for your accountant or tax agent. Reports include legislative references and recommended actions.
